dvids.title: 2026 Independence Day Celebration
dvids.desc: NAVAL SUPPORT ACTIVITY SOUDA BAY, Greece (July 1, 2026) The Naval Support Activity (NSA) Souda Bay Morale, Welfare and Recreation Department hosted an Independence Day Celebration for NSA Souda Bay and its tenant commands, along with guests from local military and civil authorities, at Limnoupolis W

dvids.title: CENTCOM Leads Regional Security Dialogue with 12 Nations in Bahrain
dvids.desc: U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) led a regional security dialogue hosted by the Bahrain Defense Force, July 1, for regional defense leaders from 12 nations.
